title: Group of trade unions and a Civil Society Organisation complaint to UK NCP about McDonald’s Restaurants Limited
body: "A complaint was filed by a group of trade unions and a Civil Society Organisation who have alleged ongoing issues of gender-based violence and harassment in McDonald’s stores in the UK.  The organisations are:   Bakers, Food and Allied Workers Union (BFAWU) Corporate Justice Coalition (CJC) International Union of Food, Agricultural, Hotel, Restaurant, Catering, Tobacco and Allied Workers’ Associations Global Union (IUF) European Federation of Food, Agriculture and Tourism Trade Unions (EFFAT-IUF) Service Employees International Union (SEIU) Trades Union Congress (TCU)   "
